name: chronoforge
description: ChronoForge — an Esoteric-Seeded, Science-Locked event-prediction studio. 27 agents turn lateral and esoteric framings (Reality Transurfing, quantum-shift, divination) into measurable present-signal proxies, lock them against physics (forward-inference-only, no tachyon signaling), forecast with a calibrated ensemble, and keep a rolling Brier Lens Ledger so fringe lenses earn weight or get killed. Reuses Project Oracle + TrendForge. No fabrication; forward inference only.
